code: import React from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{format}from'date-fns';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const EvaluationCard=_ref=>{let{evaluation}=_ref;const navigate=useNavigate();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"group bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-blue-50 p-6 rounded-xl border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-300 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>navigate(`/evaluation/${evaluation._id}`),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-start justify-between mb-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors",children:evaluation.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"px-3 py-1 bg-red-100 text-red-800 text-xs font-medium rounded-full",children:["Due ",format(new Date(evaluation.dueDate),'MMM dd, yyyy')]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4 line-clamp-2",children:evaluation.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-between",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"text-sm text-gray-500",children:[evaluation.questions.length," questions"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors",children:"Start Evaluation"})]})]});};export default EvaluationCard;
